title: January 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 10''' is the 10th day of the year. 355 days (356 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[George Alec Effinger]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Dan Parsons]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]] published. The cover date is April.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 49|''Star Wars Weekly'' 49]] published.
*[[1987]] – "[[Battle for the Sunstar]]," the last episode of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[1990]] – [[Diane Polley]] dies.
*[[1995]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 2|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 2]] published.
*2001 – [[Star Wars: Chewbacca (Dark Horse TPB)|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] receives two People's Choice Awards, for ''Favorite Movie'' and ''Favorite Movie, Drama''.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 7|''Legacy'' (2006) 7]] published.
*2007 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 12|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 12]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] published.
*2012 – [[Oliver Maguire]] dies.
*[[2013]] – [[Wookieepedia]] reaches 100,000 articles.
*2013 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.42|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' Comic 6.42]] published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Heroes]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 10|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 10]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Forces of Destiny—Rey]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Patrick Jordan]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 5 — The Shadow's Shadow]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 42|''Star Wars'' (2020) 42]] published.
*2024 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 8|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 8]] published.
<noinclude>
